weekly_summary: Over the past 3 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 14 total findings, with 13 unique CVEs tracked, including CVE-2026-3910, CVE-2025-12455, and CVE-2026-27750, among others. These vulnerabilities have been observed across multiple active security domains, including Browser Extensions, Containers, and Identity Authentication. The most active day was 2026-03-05, with a notable distribution of CVEs across various domains, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and monitoring to ensure the security and integrity of our infrastructure.
